sentences.translationEn: The weather was cold in the morning.

sentences.arabic: لَبِسَ الطُّلَّابُ مَعَاطِفَهُمْ وَذَهَبُوا إِلَى المَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su obukli kapute i otišli u školu.
sentences.translationEn: The students wore their coats and went to school.

sentences.translation: Ušli su u razred i osjetili toplinu.
sentences.translationEn: They entered the classroom and felt warm.

sentences.translation: Čas je počeo i svi su zaboravili na hladnoću.
sentences.translationEn: The lesson started and everyone forgot the cold.

sentences.translation: Čas je bio toplo iskustvo za sve.
sentences.translationEn: The lesson was a warm experience for everyone.
